name: DESIGN §5 Shift+Tab / §13: first-empty scan finds the previous clue's mid-word gap, landing from its start (not v2's land-on-end)
DESIGN §5 Shift+Tab / §13: an empty previous clue lands on its start (same as a forward first-empty scan)
DESIGN §5 Shift+Tab / §13 (owner decision 2026-07-10 supersedes v2's land-on-end): skips a fully filled previous clue to the previous incomplete one
DESIGN §5 Shift+Tab / §13 (owner decision 2026-07-10 supersedes audit Verdict 1's no-axis-cross): from the first across clue, Shift+Tab wraps circularly to the last down clue
DESIGN §5 Shift+Tab / §13 (owner decision 2026-07-10 supersedes audit Verdict 1's no-axis-cross): from the first down clue, Shift+Tab crosses backward into the last across clue
DESIGN §5 Shift+Tab / §13 (owner decision 2026-07-10): a fully filled board still advances Shift+Tab to the previous clue, landing on its last cell
